action.reasoning: Observation: Best still 0.4653 (iter2, replay=200/task Adam). Latest runs (incl. iter6) reach val~0.35 but test avg 0.33 with severe early-task forgetting (t0=0.179); more epochs hurt retention. Curves show slow overall val gain. Analysis: unbalanced/overfitting on recent tasks + incomplete memory code (truncated at classes_per_task). Replay helps but needs clean balanced selection (K~40/class), moderate epochs=8, larger mem=400/task for ~0.5+ avg_acc. Decision: fully rewrite clean train.py (balanced random selection per meta classes, Adam 1e-3, strong augs, frequent logging, final ckpt save), keep model.py/predict.py, train then submit_eval.
